use_cases: Primary action trigger in forms and dialogs
Icon-only buttons for compact UI layouts
Varianted button states for visual hierarchy
ai_summary: A flexible button component with 6 style variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 size options (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition and class-variance-authority for consistent styling. Supports disabled states, focus rings, and asChild prop for polymorphic rendering. Suitable as a core UI building block in SaaS, fintech, and e-commerce applications.
